steps.title: Track framework then variation
steps.content: The text first describes shared Highwaymen features: repeated compositional structures and subjects such as moonlit waters and mangrove trees. It then pivots with "But" to show individual variation through Al Black's bleaker, more minimal style.

steps.title: Reject unsupported histories
steps.content: Choice B invents a perception that the works are derivative. Choice C invents a collaboration history and influence story. Choice D invents historical circumstances and multiple artists exploring unconventional themes. The remaining choice captures shared framework followed by individual variation. The answer is A.
